message:
feat(ft-xbnl0.2.3): cx-first StorageHandle::new trailing sites (tick 302)

Migrates the remaining production `StorageHandle::new` call sites in
main.rs that had slightly different argument forms (not exactly
`&db_path`):

- `StorageHandle::new(db_path)` — different var name (2 sites, via
  replace_all): ft robot workflow paths
- `StorageHandle::new(&layout.db_path.to_string_lossy())` — single-line
  inline form: `ft get-text` command
- `StorageHandle::new(&db_path)` with `StorageHandle::new(&db_path)` —
  scoped `StorageHandle` import (via replace_all with new context):
  watch sub-command handlers
- `StorageHandle::new(&db_path).await {` (with `let storage = match`):
  `ft robot state` bookmark resolution path

All migrated to `new_with_cx` with inline cx-resolve via
`Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` where no surrounding cx
is in scope, or via named bindings like `bookmark_cx` / `gettext_cx`.

This closes the entire production `StorageHandle::new` migration in
main.rs. Only 5 remaining ambient `StorageHandle::new` sites are in
test-mod cfg blocks (L48497+, L55497+, L56984+, L57092+).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
(5 warnings baseline).

Cumulative ft-xbnl0.2.3 ticks this session: 116 (187-302).
main.rs cross-crate migration total: 236 sites (230 before + ~6).
frankenterm-core internal sites: 58 (unchanged this tick).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
